title: Kaathu Vaakula Rendu Kaadhal
desc: Love knocks on the door of Rambo, an unlucky man. However, a dilemma arises when he develops feelings for two women at the same time.

title: Pon Manickavel
desc: Pon Manickavel, IPS officer, is given the task to solve the case of a judge's murder. While his team attempts to crack the crime, the lives of high-profile persons are threatened.

title: Aruvam
desc: A woman with anosmia experiences paranormal events and soon finds herself involved in a series of mysterious murders linked to food adulteration.

title: Uravukku Mariyathai
desc: Santosh decides to keep his grandmother Sita Mahalakshmi happy at any cost because she helped him in a game of hide and seek during his childhood.

title: Por Thozhil
desc: With limited evidence in a race against time, two police officers must combine their skills and experience to arrest a psychopath targeting women.

title: Nadungaadhey Illathil Pei
desc: A man poses as a tantric to earn money for his love interest's orphanage. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to follow him after he pretends to perform an exorcism.

title: Visithiran
desc: A retired policeman known for his investigative skills grieves the death of his wife. However, things take a turn when he gets embroiled in a human trafficking case.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Yuddham Sei
desc: An officer attempts to solve a vital case in his search for his sister. He begins the investigation, unaware of the heinous secrets that await him.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Jaya Janaki Nayaka
desc: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.

title: Kadaram Kondan
desc: Vasu, a doctor, rescues KK, a criminal, from getting murdered in the hospital. However, when Vasu's wife gets kidnapped, he is asked to get KK out in exchange for his wife's safe return.

title: Saamy 2
desc: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Takkar
desc: A man who wants to be a millionaire meets a woman with a distaste for money. Their chance encounter, however, leads to an unexpected adventure.

title: Chithha
desc: Living a quiet life with his niece, Eeswaran manages to provide for her and nurtures her like a parent. However, his journey takes an insidious turn when she goes missing.

title: Pechi
desc: Accompanied by a guide, five friends go on a trekking trip to a haunted forest and despite being warned, they enter a restricted area that harbours an evil spirit.
